questionHtml:
Which are structural isomers?

       I.     CH3CH2OH and CH3OCH3

       II.     HOCH2CH3 and CH3CH2OH

       III.     CH3COOH and HCOOCH3

A.     I and II only

B.     I and III only

C.     II and III only

D.     I, II and III

meta.title: Which are structural isomers? I. CH3CH2OH and CH3OCH3 II. HOCH2CH3 and CH3CH2OH III. CH3COOH and HCOOCH3 A. I and II only B. I and III only C. II and III only D. I, II and III
